title: iberis linifolia subsp. pruitii
intro: Iberis linifolia subsp. pruitii, also known as rock candytuft, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to relieve respiratory issues and soothe irritated skin. The health benefits of Iberis linifolia subsp. pruitii include its potential to reduce coughs and congestion, alleviate digestive issues, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea or using them in a tincture, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
